boundaryAssertions.ownerResponsibility: Backend/API contract, auth/session behavior, data shape, error mapping, mocks, fixtures, and risk assessment.
boundaryAssertions.forbiddenOwnershipTransfer: Does not merge mobile UI work and does not approve author=approver flows.
boundaryAssertions.externalRuntimeModificationBoundary: Does not call or modify external platform/runtime repositories and does not place mobile app files outside this repository.
boundaryAssertions.humanGateBoundary: Escalates production submit, payment, PII, external messaging, legal/terms, and accept-risk-after-gate-failure.
